hyperedges.label: DatabaseHelper uses conditional imports to abstract native (sqflite) and web (localStorage) database implementations behind a unified API
ExcelExporter uses conditional imports to abstract native file saving (FilePicker/Share) and web file saving (Blob download)
Core business domain models forming the billing/accounting system: bills, customers, expenses, cash book, credit notes, and audit trail
Android build system files: Gradle configs, manifest, wrapper properties, and Kotlin entry point forming the Android host app for Flutter
Interconnected billing types: Bill contains BillItems, CreditNote references Bills and reuses BillItems, governed by PaymentMethod and BillStatus enums
DatabaseHelper provides full CRUD lifecycle for Bill and Customer entities through platform-abstracted database layer

Multi-channel sync architecture: AutoSync orchestrates cloud sync (Firebase for Android, Firestore REST for Windows), MergeSync resolves conflicts, TombstoneService prevents resurrection, GoogleDrive provides backup, LAN provides offline transfer
Stock quantity lifecycle: Purchase adds stock, Bill deducts stock, CreditNote restores stock (sales return), PurchaseReturn deducts stock (supplier return). All orchestrated in AppState.

Platform-specific device licensing: DeviceIdService generates per-platform IDs, SubscriptionService (Android) and WindowsFirestoreService (Windows) enforce single-device binding with migration support
Financial Year management: FYService switches DB files per Indian FY (Apr-Mar), carries forward items/customers/unpaid bills/settings, AppState.reloadAllData refreshes after switch
All three classes form the PDF/Excel report generation subsystem using pdf/printing packages.
Core billing flow: create bill → save to history → generate invoice PDF.
Validators and UpperCaseTextFormatter are shared across customer, item, and onboarding screens for data quality.
Conditional import pattern for web vs native file operations (download, upload).
All top-level feature screens share common dependencies: AppState provider, AppTheme, common_widgets, and formatters.
FlutterViewController creates FlutterEngine from DartProject and obtains FlutterView, forming the primary application lifecycle

Complete method channel communication stack: MethodChannel dispatches via BinaryMessenger, encodes/decodes with MethodCodec, wraps calls in MethodCall, and sends results via EngineMethodResult/MethodResult
Complete event channel communication stack: EventChannel uses BinaryMessenger and MethodCodec, delegates to StreamHandler, emits events via EventSink
Plugin registration and lifecycle management: PluginRegistrarManager owns PluginRegistrar instances (or PluginRegistrarWindows), which provide BinaryMessenger and manage Plugin ownership
EncodableValue (with CustomEncodableValue extension) serves as the default type parameter for MessageCodec and MethodCodec in Flutter's standard codec system
StandardCodecSerializer, StandardMessageCodec, and StandardMethodCodec are all implemented together in standard_codec.cc and form the standard codec system
These headers form the Flutter desktop C API layer providing engine, messenger, plugin registrar, and texture registrar interfaces
Windows app startup: wWinMain creates console, gets args, creates FlutterWindow, which registers plugins on OnCreate
TextureRegistrar abstract interface implemented by TextureRegistrarImpl wrapping C API, supporting PixelBufferTexture and GpuSurfaceTexture variants
RegisterPlugins uses PluginRegistry to get FlutterDesktopPluginRegistrarRef for each plugin, wrapping C API registrar

properties.context: Key feature-enabling dependencies spanning billing, auth, sync, scanning
CI builds for web, Android, and Windows platforms
Firebase used across Dart dependencies and web JS SDK
Windows build system with project, flutter, and runner CMake files

nodes.label: app/build.gradle.kts
nodes.description: Android app-level Gradle build config. Defines namespace com.mybillu.my_billu, applicationId, minSdk 23, Java 17 compat, multiDex, release signing config, and Flutter plugin.

nodes.label: AndroidManifest.xml
nodes.description: Android manifest declaring permissions (INTERNET, storage, camera, biometric, WiFi/network), MainActivity with LAUNCHER intent, Flutter embedding v2, and query intents for text processing, url_launcher, share_plus, and email.

nodes.label: MainActivity.kt
nodes.description: Android entry point. Extends FlutterFragmentActivity for Flutter embedding.

nodes.label: build.gradle.kts
nodes.description: Root-level Android Gradle build config. Sets up repositories (google, mavenCentral), redirects build output to ../../build, and registers clean task.

nodes.label: gradle-wrapper.properties
nodes.description: Gradle wrapper config using Gradle 8.14-all distribution.

nodes.label: settings.gradle.kts
nodes.description: Android settings Gradle. Configures pluginManagement with Flutter SDK path, declares plugins: flutter-plugin-loader 1.0.0, android application 8.11.1, kotlin-android 2.2.20, google-services 4.4.2.

nodes.label: DatabaseHelper
nodes.description: Singleton facade class providing platform-abstracted CRUD operations for items, customers, bills, purchases, settings, and dashboard statistics.

nodes.label: WebDB
nodes.description: Web-only localStorage-backed database wrapper with in-memory table cache and persistence methods.

nodes.label: ExcelExporter
nodes.description: Static utility class providing Excel export for items, customers, and bills lists.

nodes.label: FullBackupExporter
nodes.description: Static utility class that produces a full multi-sheet Excel backup of all business entities.

nodes.label: BillItem
nodes.description: Line item within a bill, tracking item reference, pricing, quantity, tax rate, and computed GST split.

nodes.label: Bill
nodes.description: Invoice/bill entity with bill number, customer reference, line items, financial totals, payment tracking, and status.

nodes.label: PaymentMethod
nodes.description: Enum: cash, upi, card, bank, credit.

nodes.label: BillStatus
nodes.description: Enum: paid, unpaid, partial.

nodes.label: AuditAction
nodes.description: Enum: created, updated, deleted.

nodes.label: AuditEntity
nodes.description: Enum listing all auditable entity types in the system.

nodes.label: AuditEntry
nodes.description: Audit log entry recording action, entity type, entity name, details, and timestamp.

nodes.label: TransactionType
nodes.description: Enum: cashIn, cashOut, bankIn, bankOut, bankTransfer.

nodes.label: BankAccount
nodes.description: Bank account entity with bank details, IFSC, branch, holder, and balance.

nodes.label: CashBookEntry
nodes.description: Financial transaction entry with type, amount, description, reference, and optional bank account link.

nodes.label: CreditNote
nodes.description: Credit note entity linked to a bill with returned items, financials, reason, and status.

nodes.label: CreditNoteStatus
nodes.description: Enum: issued, adjusted, cancelled.

nodes.label: Customer
nodes.description: Customer entity with contact info, GSTIN, purchase totals, and outstanding balance.

nodes.label: Expense
nodes.description: Expense record with categorized spending, amount, notes, and date tracking.

nodes.label: ExpenseCategory
nodes.description: Enum of 13 expense categories: rent, salary, electricity, water, internet, transport, packaging, maintenance, marketing, insurance, tax, office, misc.

nodes.label: MainActivity
nodes.description: Android entry point extending FlutterFragmentActivity.

nodes.label: web_helper
nodes.description: Platform-agnostic web helper using conditional import to load stub vs web implementation.

nodes.label: web_helper_stub
nodes.description: Non-web platform stub providing downloadJson, triggerFileUpload, triggerImageUpload using file_picker/share_plus.

nodes.label: web_helper_web
nodes.description: Web platform implementation providing downloadJson, triggerFileUpload, triggerImageUpload using dart:html.

nodes.label: flutter_engine.cc
nodes.description: Implementation of FlutterEngine C++ wrapper. Constructs engine from DartProject, manages lifecycle (Run, ShutDown), message processing, plugin registrar access, and external window message forwarding.

nodes.label: flutter_view_controller.cc
nodes.description: Implementation of FlutterViewController. Creates FlutterEngine and FlutterView, manages view controller lifecycle, redraw, and top-level window proc handling.

nodes.label: basic_message_channel.h
nodes.description: Template class BasicMessageChannel for asynchronous message passing with Flutter engine. Includes internal helpers ResizeChannel and SetChannelWarnsOnOverflow.

nodes.label: binary_messenger.h
nodes.description: Abstract interface BinaryMessenger for binary channel communication with Flutter engine. Defines BinaryReply and BinaryMessageHandler typedefs.

nodes.label: byte_streams.h
nodes.description: Abstract interfaces ByteStreamReader and ByteStreamWriter for codec-level byte stream I/O.

nodes.label: dart_project.h
nodes.description: DartProject class configuring Flutter engine assets, ICU data, AOT library paths, entrypoint, GPU preference, and UI thread policy. Declares GpuPreference and UIThreadPolicy enums.

nodes.label: encodable_value.h
nodes.description: EncodableValue variant type mapping Dart types to C++ types for Flutter standard codec. Includes CustomEncodableValue, EncodableList, and EncodableMap aliases.

nodes.label: engine_method_result.h
nodes.description: EngineMethodResult template class implementing MethodResult to send encoded responses back to Flutter engine. Contains internal::ReplyManager helper.

nodes.label: event_channel.h
nodes.description: EventChannel template class for asynchronous event stream communication with Flutter. Contains private EventSinkImplementation nested class.

nodes.label: event_sink.h
nodes.description: Abstract EventSink template class for sending events (Success, Error, EndOfStream) to Flutter application.

nodes.label: event_stream_handler.h
nodes.description: StreamHandler abstract template class for handling event stream setup (OnListen) and teardown (OnCancel). Defines StreamHandlerError struct.

nodes.label: event_stream_handler_functions.h
nodes.description: StreamHandlerFunctions template class implementing StreamHandler via function objects. Defines StreamHandlerListen and StreamHandlerCancel type aliases.

nodes.label: flutter_engine.h
nodes.description: FlutterEngine class declaration. Extends PluginRegistry, provides Run, ShutDown, ProcessMessages, messenger access, and external window message processing.

nodes.label: flutter_view.h
nodes.description: FlutterView class wrapping FlutterDesktopViewRef. Provides GetNativeWindow (HWND) and GetGraphicsAdapter (IDXGIAdapter) access. Defines FlutterViewId typedef.

nodes.label: flutter_view_controller.h
nodes.description: FlutterViewController class declaration. Creates and owns FlutterEngine and FlutterView, handles top-level window proc delegation.

nodes.label: message_codec.h
nodes.description: Abstract MessageCodec template class for encoding/decoding binary messages to/from typed values.

nodes.label: method_call.h
nodes.description: MethodCall template class encapsulating a method name and typed arguments from Flutter.

nodes.label: method_channel.h
nodes.description: MethodChannel template class for bidirectional method invocation with Flutter engine. Defines MethodCallHandler type alias.

nodes.label: method_codec.h
nodes.description: Abstract MethodCodec template class for encoding/decoding method calls, success envelopes, and error envelopes.

nodes.label: method_result.h
nodes.description: Abstract MethodResult template class for sending success, error, or not-implemented responses to method calls.

nodes.label: method_result_functions.h
nodes.description: MethodResultFunctions template class implementing MethodResult via function objects. Defines ResultHandlerSuccess, ResultHandlerError, ResultHandlerNotImplemented aliases.

nodes.label: plugin_registrar.h
nodes.description: PluginRegistrar class managing plugin registration, owning BinaryMessenger and TextureRegistrar. Also defines Plugin base class and PluginRegistrarManager singleton.

nodes.label: plugin_registrar_windows.h
nodes.description: PluginRegistrarWindows extending PluginRegistrar with Windows-specific functionality: view access, WindowProc delegate registration. Defines WindowProcDelegate type alias.

nodes.label: FlutterEngine
nodes.description: C++ wrapper around the Flutter desktop engine C API. Manages engine lifecycle, message processing, plugin registrar access, and binary messenger.

nodes.label: FlutterViewController
nodes.description: C++ wrapper creating and managing a view displaying Flutter content. Owns a FlutterEngine and FlutterView.

nodes.label: FlutterView
nodes.description: C++ wrapper around FlutterDesktopViewRef providing native window (HWND) and graphics adapter (IDXGIAdapter) access.

nodes.label: DartProject
nodes.description: Configuration class for Flutter engine initialization: asset paths, ICU data, AOT library, entrypoint, GPU preference, UI thread policy.

nodes.label: BinaryMessenger
nodes.description: Abstract interface for binary channel communication (Send, SetMessageHandler) with the Flutter engine.

nodes.label: BasicMessageChannel
nodes.description: Template class for asynchronous typed message passing with Flutter via BinaryMessenger and MessageCodec.

nodes.label: MethodChannel
nodes.description: Template class for bidirectional method invocation with Flutter engine via BinaryMessenger and MethodCodec.

nodes.label: EventChannel
nodes.description: Template class for asynchronous event stream communication with Flutter. Uses StreamHandler and EventSink.

nodes.label: EventSink
nodes.description: Abstract template class for emitting success events, error events, and end-of-stream signals to Flutter.

nodes.label: StreamHandler
nodes.description: Abstract template class for handling event stream setup (OnListen) and teardown (OnCancel) requests.

nodes.label: StreamHandlerFunctions
nodes.description: Concrete StreamHandler implementation delegating OnListen/OnCancel to function objects.

nodes.label: StreamHandlerError
nodes.description: Struct holding error_code, error_message, and error_details for stream handler errors.

nodes.label: MessageCodec
nodes.description: Abstract template class for encoding/decoding messages between binary and typed representations.

nodes.label: MethodCodec
nodes.description: Abstract template class for encoding/decoding method calls and response envelopes.

nodes.label: MethodCall
nodes.description: Template class encapsulating a Flutter method call name and typed arguments.

nodes.label: MethodResult
nodes.description: Abstract template class for sending success/error/not-implemented responses for method calls.

nodes.label: MethodResultFunctions
nodes.description: Concrete MethodResult implementation delegating responses to function objects.

nodes.label: EngineMethodResult
nodes.description: MethodResult implementation that sends encoded responses back to the Flutter engine via ReplyManager.

nodes.label: ReplyManager
nodes.description: Internal helper managing one-time binary response sending for EngineMethodResult.

nodes.label: EncodableValue
nodes.description: Variant type mapping Dart types to C++ types for the Flutter standard message codec.

nodes.label: CustomEncodableValue
nodes.description: Container for arbitrary custom types in EncodableValue, wrapping std::any.

nodes.label: ByteStreamReader
nodes.description: Abstract interface for reading bytes, integers, and doubles from a byte stream for codec use.

nodes.label: ByteStreamWriter
nodes.description: Abstract interface for writing bytes, integers, and doubles to a byte stream for codec use.

nodes.label: PluginRegistrar
nodes.description: Manages plugin registration, provides BinaryMessenger and TextureRegistrar access, and owns plugin instances.

nodes.label: PluginRegistrarWindows
nodes.description: Windows-specific extension of PluginRegistrar providing FlutterView access and WindowProc delegate registration.

nodes.label: Plugin
nodes.description: Base class for plugins that can be registered with PluginRegistrar for ownership.

nodes.label: PluginRegistrarManager
nodes.description: Singleton managing PluginRegistrar instances keyed by FlutterDesktopPluginRegistrarRef.

nodes.label: GpuPreference
nodes.description: Enum configuring GPU selection: NoPreference, LowPowerPreference, HighPerformancePreference.

nodes.label: UIThreadPolicy
nodes.description: Enum configuring UI isolate thread policy: Default, RunOnPlatformThread, RunOnSeparateThread.

properties.description: My Billu - Smart Billing Software for Windows & Android

properties.title: My Billu - Smart Billing Software
properties.description: My Billu - Smart Billing & Inventory Management Software for Indian Businesses. GST compliant invoicing, stock management, and financial reports.
Blue letter B with cat silhouette and coin/dollar icons, app branding logo
Hindu deity Lord Ganesh illustration in red with Shree (Sri) symbol, religious/cultural branding element
GitHub 404 page screenshot, likely a placeholder or incorrectly captured image
Small blue arrow/chevron icon used as browser tab favicon

links.label: FYService manages DatabaseHelper DB file switching and year-end migration
Native and web DB implementations are platform-specific counterparts with identical API surface
Native DB serializes Bill items to/from JSON strings for SQLite storage
DatabaseHelper delegates all DB operations to platform_db (native)
imports Bill model for web CRUD
imports Customer model for web CRUD
DatabaseHelper delegates all DB operations to platform_db (web)

links.detail: Uses ExcelExporter for customer data export.
Uses ExcelExporter for bill history export.
Uses ExcelExporter for item catalog export.

links.label: Native and web file save implementations are platform-specific counterparts

links.detail: Displays AuditEntry list from AppState with entity/action filtering.
Creates Bill objects from cart items during bill creation.
Imports Bill model for credit note bill reference.
Uses Bill model for sales metrics and charts.
Creates temporary Bill objects for quotation PDF generation.
Displays Bill list with search and detail view.

links.label: QuotationStatus.converted implies Quotation can be converted to a Bill
AppState manages CRUD for Bill list
GoogleDriveSync uploads/downloads Bill data to Drive
MergeSyncService.mergeBills resolves billNumber conflicts across devices
ExcelImporter.importLedger creates Bill instances from Excel rows

links.detail: Uses Bill model for B2B/B2C classification and tax computation in GSTR-1 exports.
Generates PDF invoices from Bill model data across all 5 templates.
Uses Bill model for Sales Register and GST Computation reports.
Displays and manages CreditNote objects.

links.label: AppState manages CRUD for CreditNote list

links.detail: Customer selection for bill association.
Uses Customer model for ledger customer selection.
CRUD operations on Customer model.
Uses Customer model for quotation recipient.

links.label: AppState manages CRUD for Customer list
GoogleDriveSync uploads/downloads Customer data to Drive
ExcelImporter.importCustomers creates Customer instances from Excel rows

links.detail: Uses Customer model to build GSTIN lookup map for B2B/B2C bill classification.
Displays and creates Expense entries with category and period filtering.

links.label: AppState manages CRUD for Expense list

links.detail: Uses Expense model for operating expense breakdown in P&L report.
Uses Item model in cart for pricing and tax calculation.
Uses Item model in quotation cart.
CRUD operations on Item catalog.

links.label: AppState manages CRUD for Item list

links.detail: Item selection for purchase line items.

links.label: GoogleDriveSync uploads/downloads Item data to Drive
ExcelImporter.importItems creates Item instances from Excel rows

links.detail: Imports Purchase model for item-purchase relationship display.

links.label: Purchase.supplierName denormalizes Supplier.name (no FK, matched by name string)
AppState manages CRUD for Purchase list

links.detail: CRUD operations on Purchase model.

links.label: GoogleDriveSync uploads/downloads Purchase data to Drive

links.detail: Uses Purchase model for P&L cost-of-goods and input tax calculations.

links.label: AppState manages CRUD for PurchaseReturn list
AppState manages CRUD for Quotation list (JSON-blob storage)
AppState manages CRUD for RecurringBill list
AppState manages CRUD for Supplier list

links.detail: Supplier selection for purchase association.

links.label: ExcelImporter.importSuppliers creates Supplier instances from Excel rows

links.detail: Consumer<AppState> reads auditLog and clearAuditLog.
Consumer<AppState> for items, customers, settings, and bill creation.
Uses AppState via Provider for cash book data.
Watches AppState for customer list.
Core data source for dashboard metrics via Provider.
Uses AppState for login credential verification.
Saves business setup data to AppState during onboarding.

links.label: AppState holds optional AutoSyncService reference for sync notifications
AppState calls TombstoneService.recordDeletion on every delete

links.detail: Uses AppState for data access via Provider.

links.label: FirebaseSyncService.smartSync takes AppState for data read/write
AppStrings provides localized labels for all entities managed by AppState
AppFormatters formats currency/dates for display of AppState entity data
AutoSyncService uses MergeSyncService for merge operations during sync
AutoSyncService uses TombstoneService to filter deleted records during sync
AutoSyncService._windowsSync delegates to WindowsFirestoreService for REST sync
LanSyncService provides offline device-to-device transfer as alternative to cloud sync
SubscriptionService uses DeviceIdService for device binding and registration
WindowsFirestoreService uses DeviceIdService for device identity in registration and sync
FirebaseSyncService uses MergeSyncService for merge during smartSync
FirebaseSyncService uses TombstoneService for deletion tracking
GoogleDriveSync is a simpler backup-only alternative to FirebaseSyncService's merge-sync

links.detail: Uses FYService for financial year calculation and display.
Uses SubscriptionService for all admin CRUD operations on client subscriptions.
Checks subscription status and expiry for dashboard display.
Uses WindowsFirestoreService for cloud sync on Windows platform.

links.label: Both provide Google sign-in on Windows: WindowsFirestoreService.signInWithGoogle (built-in OAuth) vs WindowsGoogleAuth (standalone)
AppTheme.allThemes is List<ThemePalette> of 10 predefined themes

links.detail: Uses AppConstants for branding/config values.
Uses ExcelImporter for bulk customer import.
Uses ExcelImporter for bulk item import.
Uses AppFormatters for currency and payment method display.
Both generate tax/financial reports; GSTR1Exporter focuses on GST filing format while ReportPdfExporter covers general business reports.
InvoiceGenerator produces individual invoice PDFs while GSTR1Exporter produces aggregate tax filing reports — both output PDFs/Excel from Bill data.
Uses UpperCaseTextFormatter for GSTIN input fields.
Uses UpperCaseTextFormatter for GSTIN input.
Uses UpperCaseTextFormatter for GSTIN input during onboarding.
Imports InvoiceGenerator for post-billing PDF generation.
Uses InvoiceGenerator to generate quotation PDFs with custom document title.
Uses InvoiceGenerator for printing/sharing/saving invoices from bill history.
Expenses entered here feed into P&L report generation.
Uses Validators for GSTIN validation and duplicate customer checking.
Uses Validators for duplicate item name checking.
Uses GlassCard widget for client card display.
Both screens use identical cart-item pattern with item selection, quantity management, and GST computation.
Bills created in BillingScreen appear in HistoryScreen for review and reprinting.
Customer management feeds customer data into ledger view for transaction history.
Dashboard likely links to history for drill-down on sales metrics.
First-time users go through onboarding before reaching login; returning users go directly to login.

links.label: App module included and plugin versions managed by settings.gradle.kts
MainActivity build config defined in app build.gradle.kts
Settings and root build.gradle.kts are co-level Android project configs
FullBackupExporter exports all entity types while ExcelExporter exports individual types
BillItem is a nested value object within bill.dart
AuditEntity.bill enum value represents the Bill entity for audit logging
Bill references Customer via customerId and customerName
CashBookEntry.reference can hold a bill number linking transaction to a bill
CreditNote references a Bill via billId and billNumber
AuditEntity.customer enum value represents the Customer entity for audit logging
AuditEntity.expense enum value represents the Expense entity for audit logging
CashBookEntry optionally references a BankAccount via bankAccountId

links.detail: Exports web_helper_stub.dart as default (non-web) implementation.
Exports web_helper_web.dart when dart.library.html is available (web platform).

links.label: uses BinaryMessenger* for Send and SetMessageHandler
uses BinaryMessenger* for message handler registration and event sending
parallel channel abstractions sharing internal:: helpers (ResizeChannel, SetChannelWarnsOnOverflow)
uses MethodCodec* for encoding/decoding method calls
uses MethodCodec* for encoding/decoding stream protocol
parallel codec abstractions: MessageCodec for messages, MethodCodec for method calls
uses MethodCodec* for encoding success/error envelopes
DecodeMethodCall returns unique_ptr<MethodCall>, EncodeMethodCall takes MethodCall
variant includes CustomEncodableValue as a type alternative
complementary reader/writer interfaces for byte stream codecs
singleton managing map of PluginRegistrar instances
EncodedType enum used by StandardCodecSerializer for type discrimination
uses IDI_APP_ICON for window class icon
